cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which book after all these swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial book assignments. So, at the beginning: - Alice has Moby Dick. - Bob has Ulysses. - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring. - Dave has Lolita. - Eve has Catch-22. Now, there are several trades. Let me go through each one step by step. First, Claire and Bob swap books. That means Claire gives The Fellowship of the Ring to Bob, and Bob gives Ulysses to Claire. So after the first swap: - Alice still has Moby Dick. - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring. -
